name: Shatterstone
description:
Activate (1 Action) Strike

A shatterstone is a small ceramic orb. Inside are reactive agents that set up an intense field of sonic vibration when the stone breaks. The bomb grants a +2 item bonus to attack rolls and deals 3d6 sonic damage and 3 sonic splash damage. Much of the sound is ultrasonic, and creatures with sonic weakness that take damage from the bomb must succeed at a DC 30 Fortitude check save or be Deafened until the end of their next turn.
